title: Meta Ads
kicker: Campaigns connected to real customer journeys
summary: Campaign setup, audience and creative testing, retargeting, tracking, analysis, and practical ecommerce growth systems.
description: I help ecommerce and service businesses structure Meta advertising around clear offers, measurable events, and the customer journey after the click.
My practical experience includes Pakistani ecommerce, where trust, pricing, delivery communication, message handling, and payment behavior strongly affect campaign performance.
outcomes: Better alignment between ads and landing experience
